name: repo-maintenance
description: Maintain an existing repository: review PRs, triage issues, audit codebase health, manage dependencies and releases. For custodial maintenance, not greenfield development.

goals.title: Repository Maintenance Bootstrap
goals.description: Onboard to the existing codebase and establish maintenance processes: audit the repo, set up quality gates, triage open issues, and reach steady-state maintenance.

milestones.title: Repo Onboarding
milestones.description: Understand the existing codebase and document its current state.
milestones.completionCriteria: docs/CODEBASE-AUDIT.md exists with architecture overview, tech debt inventory, and test coverage assessment.

milestones.title: Process Setup
milestones.description: Establish PR review, issue triage, and release workflows.
milestones.completionCriteria: Branch protection configured, PR conventions documented, issue labels created, release process documented.

milestones.title: Initial Sweep
milestones.description: Process all existing open PRs and issues, run first dependency audit and codebase health pass.
milestones.completionCriteria: All open PRs reviewed, all open issues triaged, dependency audit complete, first batch of cleanup issues created.

milestones.title: Steady State
milestones.description: Ongoing maintenance loop — agents handle PRs, issues, and health on every heartbeat.
milestones.completionCriteria: Maintenance processes running autonomously for 3+ heartbeat cycles with no backlog buildup.

issues.title: Audit codebase and document architecture
issues.description: Read the existing codebase, map architecture, identify tech debt hotspots and test coverage gaps. Document in docs/CODEBASE-AUDIT.md.

issues.title: Run initial dependency audit
issues.description: Audit all dependencies for outdated versions and known vulnerabilities. Document in docs/DEPENDENCY-AUDIT.md. Apply safe patch updates.

issues.title: Configure branch protection and PR workflow
issues.description: Set up branch protection on main, require PR reviews, configure review conventions. Document in docs/pr-conventions.md.

issues.title: Set up issue labels and triage workflow
issues.description: Create GitHub labels for issue classification (bug, feature, enhancement, question, duplicate, invalid) and priority levels (P0-P3). Document the triage process.

issues.title: Document or establish release process
issues.description: Review current release workflow. If none exists, establish semver + changelog. Document in docs/RELEASE-PROCESS.md.

issues.title: Review all open pull requests
issues.description: Fetch all open PRs on the GitHub repo. Review each for correctness, security, and style. Approve and merge those that pass, request changes on those that don't.

issues.title: Triage all open GitHub issues
issues.description: Review all open issues. Classify by type and priority, respond to reporters, close duplicates and invalid issues, convert actionable items to Paperclip tasks.

issues.title: First codebase health pass
issues.description: Based on the codebase audit, execute the highest-priority cleanup tasks: remove dead code, fix inconsistencies, simplify overly complex areas. Create PRs for each fix.
